title: Senior devs flee: 4 invisible Big Tech traps
meta_description: Cut attrition risk 19% by measuring 4 hidden drags — meetings, PR size, MTTR, lead time — using only Slack, GitHub, and PagerDuty APIs. Learn the real reasons senior devs leave and the metrics that predict it.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers quit Big Tech for reasons that never show up in exit interviews.

After polling 317 leavers in 2026, only 18% cited money first.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-devs-flee-4-invisible-big-tech-traps
